title: selaginella thysanophylla
intro: Selaginella thysanophylla, also known as Spiny Club Fern or Thai Spiny Club Fern, is a species of spore-producing vascular plant in the genus Selaginella. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a powder to harness its medicinal properties.
